The '''KLR series combat droids''' were bipedal [[Droid/Legends|droids]] designed by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Army Weapons Research Department]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in the [[Tembora Research Station]] on the rogue [[Planet/Legends|planetoid]] [[Tembora]].

They were successfully designed to employ the most sophisticated droid tactical programming and have the highest survivability of any combat [[Droid/Legends|droid]] which was in use at the time, and was able to defeat any other droid in one on one combat at its time. Each droid was armed with a [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]], [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]], and heavy [[Grasper arm/Legends|grasping arm]] in one arm and a [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]] in the other. Unfortunately the very programming that it was designed to have also caused the first prototype, [[KLR-B1]], to turn into a psychopath. Because of this, the technicians attempted to shut down all of the prototypes. They successfully shut down [[KLR-B2]], [[KLR-B3]], and [[KLR-B4]], but somehow KLR-B1 managed to escape this and murdered everyone on the stations.
